Title: User logs in successfully
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the username "testuser" and password "password123".
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the home page.

Title: User logs in with incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the username "testuser" and incorrect password "wrongpassword".
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating incorrect credentials and remains on the login page.

Title: User logs in with non-existent username
Preconditions: No user with the given username exists in the database
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the non-existent username "nonexistentuser" and password "password123".
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the username does not exist and remains on the login page.

Title: User views a product successfully
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product listing page.
2. User selects the "Sample Product" to view details.
3. User clicks the "View" button.
Expected Result: User sees the details of the "Sample Product".

Title: User attempts to view a non-existent product
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product listing page.
2. User selects the "Nonexistent Product" to view details.
3. User clicks the "View" button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the product does not exist.

Title: User adds a product to the cart successfully
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product listing page.
2. User selects the "Sample Product" to add to the cart.
3. User clicks the "Add to Cart" button.
Expected Result: User sees a confirmation message indicating that the product has been added to the cart.

Title: User attempts to add a non-existent product to the cart
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product listing page.
2. User selects the "Nonexistent Product" to add to the cart.
3. User clicks the "Add to Cart" button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the product does not exist.

Title: User completes checkout successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the cart page.
2. User reviews the items in the cart.
3. User clicks the "Checkout" button.
4. User confirms the checkout details.
Expected Result: User sees a confirmation message indicating that the checkout was successful.

Title: User attempts to checkout with an empty cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and has no items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the cart page.
2. User tries to click the "Checkout" button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the cart is empty and cannot proceed to checkout.

Title: Admin adds a product successfully
Test Data:
- Product Name: "New Product"
- Description: "Description of New Product"
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the product management page.
2. Admin fills in the product name and description fields.
3. Admin clicks the "Add" button.
Expected Result: Admin sees a confirmation message indicating that the product has been added successfully.

Title: Admin attempts to add a product with invalid data
Test Data:
- Invalid Product Name: ""
- Description: "Description of New Product"
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the product management page.
2. Admin leaves the product name field empty and fills in the description field.
3. Admin clicks the "Add" button.
Expected Result: Admin sees an error message indicating that the product name is required.

Title: User transitions to admin mode successfully
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User clicks the "Login as Admin" option.
3. User enters the admin username "adminuser" and password "adminpassword".
4. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is logged in as an admin and redirected to the admin dashboard.

Title: User fails to transition to admin mode with incorrect credentials
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User clicks the "Login as Admin" option.
3. User enters the admin username "adminuser" and incorrect password "wrongpassword".
4. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating incorrect credentials and remains on the login page.

Title: User sends a message to the application, which forwards it to the server and database
Test Steps:
1. User sends a message "Hello" to the application.
2. Application forwards the message to the server.
3. Server receives the message and forwards it to the database.
Expected Result: Database receives the message "Hello" and processes it accordingly.

Title: User interacts with the application, server, and database
Test Steps:
1. User performs an action within the application.
2. Application interacts with the server.
3. Server interacts with the database.
Expected Result: The action is processed correctly by the database and the result is returned to the user via the application.

Title: User purchases a product successfully
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product listing page.
2. User selects the "Sample Product" to purchase.
3. User clicks the "Buy" button.
4. Server processes the purchase request.
5. Server updates the database with the purchase information.
Expected Result: User sees a confirmation message indicating that the purchase was successful.

Title: User attempts to purchase a non-existent product
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product listing page.
2. User selects the "Nonexistent Product" to purchase.
3. User clicks the "Buy" button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the product does not exist.

Title: User registers successfully
Preconditions: User does not exist in the database
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User fills in the registration form with the provided details.
3. User clicks the "Register" button.
Expected Result: User sees a confirmation message indicating that the registration was successful.

Title: User attempts to register with an existing username
Preconditions: User already exists in the database
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User fills in the registration form with the provided details.
3. User clicks the "Register" button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the username is already taken.

Title: User navigates to different pages successfully
Test Data: - Pages: Home, Product Listing, Cart, Checkout, Admin Dashboard
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home page.
2. User clicks on the "Product Listing" link.
3. User clicks on the "Cart" link.
4. User clicks on the "Checkout" link.
5. User clicks on the "Admin Dashboard" link (if logged in as admin).
Expected Result: User is redirected to the respective pages without errors.

Title: User attempts to navigate to a restricted page without proper permissions
Preconditions: User is logged in but not an admin
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home page.
2. User clicks on the "Admin Dashboard" link.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that they do not have permission to access the admin dashboard.

Title: User logs out successfully
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the account settings page.
2. User clicks the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: User is logged out successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: User attempts to log out while not logged in
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that they are not currently logged in.

Title: System handles unexpected errors gracefully
Test Steps:
1. User performs an action that requires interaction with the database.
2. System encounters an unexpected error (e.g., database connection failure).
Expected Result: User sees a generic error message indicating that an unexpected error occurred and is prompted to try again later.

Title: System handles invalid input gracefully
